_readme: Durable live-verified reference for the Necromancer class, built to support WeakAuras work. Keyed by ability NAME (not spellId) deliberately - rank-variant abilities like Crypt Swarm have too many distinct spellIds (15 candidates found in Spell.dbc) to track cleanly by ID, and WeakAuras' own combat-log/cast triggers can match by name directly, which naturally covers whatever rank a player has learned. spellId is included as a best-effort cross-reference where independently known (from Input/necromancer_talents.json), not as the primary key. Two source types: 'trainer' (gold-trained baseline/leveling abilities, captured live via the stock GetTrainerServiceInfo API - includes real per-rank cost, level requirement, and fully server-resolved description text) and 'talent' (talent-point investments, captured live by reading spellID/rank/maxRank fields directly off the custom CoATalentFrame's button widgets, since this server's talent system does not use the stock Blizzard talent API at all - confirmed via GetNumTalentTabs() returning 0 through both known call shapes). verifiedLive:true on every entry here reflects that all of it came from a real live client capture, not derived/guessed.
capturedFrom: Gravekeeper (live character), trainer NPC "Nightmarish Book of Ascension"

ranks.description:
Command your |cFFFFFFFFUndead|r to focus their attacks on the target enemy.

Usable while casting or channeling.

Raise a |cffffffffCrypt Fiend|r to aid you in combat, occupying 2 |cffffffffLife Force|r.

|cff90ee90Command|r: Shoots barbs at your target that deal 35 Frost damage and bounce to a nearby enemy.

Your undead minions assume a passive behavior and will not attack enemies or cast spells.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffUndead Stance|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Your undead minions assume a defensive behavior, increasing threat and Armor.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffUndead Stance|r can be active at a time.:ext@
Your |cffffffffLife Force|r is increased by 1.

Raise a |cffffffffGreater Skeletal Warrior|r to aid you in combat, occupying 1 |cffffffffLife Force|r.

|cff90ee90Command|r: Strikes an enemy in front of it and deals Weapon Damage plus 2, reducing their Armor by 10% for 15 sec, stacking 2 times.

Your undead minions assume an aggresive behaviour, increasing movement speed by 50%.

@ext:Only 1 |cffffffffUndead Stance|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Create 1 |cffffffffBone Reliquary|r that restores 30% of your missing health.

Allies may only use a |cffffffffBone Reliquary|r once per minute. Shares a cooldown with similar effects.

Raise a |cffffffffSkeletal Rogue|r to aid you in combat, occupying 1 |cffffffffLife Force|r. 

Has a chance to apply |cffffffffDecaying Poison|r on hit, reducing the target's casting speed by 10% for 6 sec, stacking 3 times.

|cff90ee90Command|r: Leaps to your target and strikes it 2 to 5 times. Always strikes 5 times on enemies below 35% health.
